problem id: 4005e4c7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(6)

examples:
  11001011 -> 01000000
  11110111 -> 11000000
  00100001 -> 00000000
  11110001 -> 00000000
  11111111 -> 11000000
  10100000 -> 00000000
  00011101 -> 00000000
  01011110 -> 10000000

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 00000000
